description_long: This object is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish and a robust, angular design. The frame features a textured, ergonomic grip with horizontal grooves for improved handling and control. The slide is squared with serrations at the rear for easier manipulation, and it includes a red fiber optic front sight for enhanced aiming visibility. The trigger guard is generously sized and rounded, providing ample space for gloved fingers. Subtle markings and a serial number are visible on the slide and frame, adding to its realistic detailing. The magazine base is slightly extended and contoured, blending seamlessly with the grip for a streamlined appearance.
description: A matte black, modern semi-automatic handgun with a textured ergonomic grip, squared slide, and red fiber optic front sight. Features detailed slide markings and a contoured magazine base.
description_view_0: The muzzle end of the handgun is visible, showing the barrel opening, front sight, and the top of the slide with serrations.
description_view_1: The left side reveals the slide serrations, ejection port, trigger, and the full ergonomic grip with horizontal grooves.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the back of the slide, rear sight, and the grip's textured surface.
description_view_3: The right side displays the slide, trigger, grip, and additional slide markings, mirroring the left but with subtle differences in control placement.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with a pronounced palm swell and features a series of horizontal grooves running along its length, providing a secure, non-slip surface. The material appears to be a matte black polymer, offering both durability and comfort. There are no visible logos or embellishments, but the ergonomic shaping suggests attention to user comfort and control. The backstrap is slightly arched, and the sides are gently curved to fit the hand naturally.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, with a smooth, untextured surface. It is generously sized, allowing for easy access even with gloves, and features a subtle undercut at the rear for improved grip ergonomics. The design is functional and streamlined, without any squared-off edges or integrated accessories.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the slide, and has a smooth, unadorned exterior. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide. The muzzle is slightly recessed, and no external markings are present on the barrel itself.
attribute_slide_markings: Visible on the left side of the slide are small, engraved alphanumeric markings resembling a serial number, along with subtle horizontal serrations at the rear for grip. The right side also features similar serrations and a faint model designation. The markings are understated, blending into the matte finish but adding a touch of realism.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is slightly extended and contoured to align with the grip, creating a seamless transition. It is flat on the bottom with gently beveled edges, and there are no visible finger rests, logos, or texturing. The design is minimalist and functional, prioritizing smooth insertion and removal.
